description_long: This street food stall features a sturdy metal frame with a prominent red canopy that provides shade and shelter for both the vendor and customers. The canopy is emblazoned with the words 'Eloter y Tamaler' in white script, indicating the type of food sold. The main body of the stall is constructed from stainless steel, with multiple compartments and containers for food preparation and storage, including visible pots and trays. The stall is mounted on wheels for mobility, with a handle for pushing and maneuvering. There are two large wheels on one side and two smaller stabilizing legs on the other, ensuring stability when stationary. The overall design is functional and practical, suitable for urban street vending environments.
description: A mobile street food stall with a red canopy labeled 'Eloter y Tamaler', stainless steel body, and multiple food preparation compartments. It features wheels and a handle for easy movement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red canopy with 'Eloter y Tamaler' signage and the main serving area beneath.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the stall, including pots, trays, and the handle for pushing.
description_view_2: Rear view with the canopy and back of the stall, less detail visible compared to the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional compartments, wheels, and the handle, with signage visible on the canopy.
attribute_signage: White script text 'Eloter y Tamaler' on the front and side of the red canopy; additional circular logo on the side panel.
attribute_serving_counter: A wide, flat stainless steel counter runs the length of the stall, with multiple compartments and trays for serving food; no glass shield is visible.
attribute_food_display: Food is displayed in open stainless steel pots and trays, easily accessible from the serving counter, with no visible protective covers.
attribute_architectural_style: industrial metal frame with a colorful canopy
